testcase.name: arch.arm.swap.common.fpu_sharing.arm_thread_swap.arm_thread_swap
testcase.failure:
0 - address 0x20200030 allocated 12, free 180, max allocafree 196, max allocated 156, heap size 256 *** Booting Zephyr OS build v4.4.0-6582-g191d4b5cada0 *** Running TESTSUITE arm_thread_swap =================================================================== START - test_arm_syscalls Available IRQ line: 141 USR Thread: IRQ Line: 141 PASS - test_arm_syscalls in 0.005 seconds =================================================================== START - test_arm_thread_swap

------ TESTSUITE SUMMARY START ------
SUITE FAIL - 66.67% [arm_thread_swap]: pass = 2, fail = 1, skip = 0, total = 3 duration = 0.035 seconds - PASS - [arm_thread_swap.test_arm_syscalls] duration = 0.005 seconds - FAIL - [arm_thread_swap.test_arm_thread_swap] duration = 0.024 seconds - PASS - [arm_thread_swap.test_syscall_cpu_scrubs_regs] duration = 0.006 seconds
------ TESTSUITE SUMMARY END ------
=================================================================== RunID: 0dc378be42071c69179f69a6ff49d376 PROJECT EXECUTION FAILED

testcase.failure:
*** Booting Zephyr OS build v4.4.0-6582-g191d4b5cada0 *** Running TESTSUITE counter_basic =================================================================== START - test_all_channels Testing gpt@401f0000 PASS - test_all_channels in 0.133 seconds =================================================================== START - test_cancelled_alarm_does_not_expire Skipped for gpt@401f0000 SKIP - test_cancelled_alarm_does_not_expire in 0.103 seconds =================================================================== START - test_late_alarm Skipped for gpt@401f0000 SKIP - test_late_alarm in 0.103 seconds =================================================================== START - test_late_alarm_error Skipped for gpt@401f0000 SKIP - test_late_alarm_error in 0.103 seconds =================================================================== START - test_multiple_alarms Skipped for gpt@401f0000 SKIP - test_multiple_alarms in 0.103 seconds =================================================================== START - test_set_top_value_with_alarm E: Wrap can only be set to 0xffffffff Skipped for gpt@401f0000 SKIP - test_set_top_value_with_alarm in 0.106 seconds =================================================================== START - test_short_relative_alarm Skipped for gpt@401f0000 SKIP - test_short_relative_alarm in 0.104 seconds =================================================================== START - test_single_shot_alarm_notop Testing gpt@401f0000 PASS - test_single_shot_alarm_notop in 0.173 seconds =================================================================== START - test_single_shot_alarm_top E: Wrap can only be set to 0xffffffff Skipped for gpt@401f0000 SKIP - test_single_shot_alarm_top in 0.106 seconds =================================================================== START - test_valid_function_without_alarm Testing gpt@401f0000

Running TESTSUITE counter_no_callback =================================================================== START - test_set_top_value_without_alarm E: Wrap can only be set to 0xffffffff Skipped for gpt@401f0000 SKIP - test_set_top_value_without_alarm in 0.106 seconds =================================================================== TESTSUITE counter_no_callback succeeded
------ TESTSUITE SUMMARY START ------
SUITE FAIL - 66.67% [counter_basic]: pass = 2, fail = 1, skip = 7, total = 10 duration = 1.064 seconds - PASS - [counter_basic.test_all_channels] duration = 0.133 seconds - SKIP - [counter_basic.test_cancelled_alarm_does_not_expire] duration = 0.103 seconds - SKIP - [counter_basic.test_late_alarm] duration = 0.103 seconds - SKIP - [counter_basic.test_late_alarm_error] duration = 0.103 seconds - SKIP - [counter_basic.test_multiple_alarms] duration = 0.103 seconds - SKIP - [counter_basic.test_set_top_value_with_alarm] duration = 0.106 seconds - SKIP - [counter_basic.test_short_relative_alarm] duration = 0.104 seconds - PASS - [counter_basic.test_single_shot_alarm_notop] duration = 0.173 seconds - SKIP - [counter_basic.test_single_shot_alarm_top] duration = 0.106 seconds - FAIL - [counter_basic.test_valid_function_without_alarm] duration = 0.030 seconds

testcase.name: bootloader.mcuboot
testcase.failure: *** Using Zephyr OS build v4.4.0-6582-g191d4b5cada0 *** I: Starting bootloader I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none I: Primary image: magic=good, swap_type=0x3, copy_done=0x1, image_ok=0x1 I: Secondary image: magic=unset, swap_type=0x1, copy_done=0x3, image_ok=0x3 I: Boot source: none I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none W: Failed reading image headers; Image=0 E: Unable to find bootable image *** Using Zephyr OS build v4.4.0-6582-g191d4b5cada0 *** I: Starting bootloader I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none I: Primary image: magic=good, swap_type=0x3, copy_done=0x1, image_ok=0x1 I: Secondary image: magic=unset, swap_type=0x1, copy_done=0x3, image_ok=0x3 I: Boot source: none I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none W: Failed reading image headers; Image=0 E: Unable to find bootable image *** Using Zephyr OS build v4.4.0-6582-g191d4b5cada0 *** I: Starting bootloader I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none I: Primary image: magic=good, swap_type=0x3, copy_done=0x1, image_ok=0x1 I: Secondary image: magic=unset, swap_type=0x1, copy_done=0x3, image_ok=0x3 I: Boot source: none I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none I: Image index: 0, Swap type: none I: Bootloader chainload address offset: 0x20000 I: Image version: v0.0.0 I: Jumping to the first image slot *** Booting Zephyr OS build v4.4.0-6582-g191d4b5cada0 *** Launching primary slot application on mimxrt1015_evk Secondary application ready for swap, rebooting
